title: pavonia cristaliana
intro: Pavonia cristaliana, also known as the crystal rock rose or crystal rose, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family (Malvaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Pavonia cristaliana include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of diarrhea and dysentery. Pavonia cristaliana can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications to promote skin health and reduce inflammation.
